validator_assessment.weakest_link: Overnight gap is sentiment-driven (-0.59%, no catalyst), not structural — gap fills happen 70%+ of the time on news-free days; XLK outperforming SPY by +0.35% and compressed ribbon (only 1.38 EMA-wide) create real reversion pressure
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: SPY opens at or above PMH 675.98 and holds the first 5-min bar (09:30–09:35 ET) without a reversal close below it — level thesis secondary bullish scenario activates immediately and bear ribbon inverts on any sustained move above 676.25

primary.condition: if SPY fails to reclaim PMH 675.98 and rolls over from that ceiling

secondary.condition: if SPY reclaims PMH 675.98 and closes above it on a 5-min bar
secondary.entry_trigger: PMH reclaim with potential partial gap fill toward 678.45

invalidation.condition: SPY opens at or above 675.98 and holds the first RTH bar (09:30–09:35 ET) without a close back below it
invalidation.effect: Entire bearish consensus invalidated — level thesis secondary bullish scenario activates, bear ribbon inverts above 676.25, and macro gap-fill probability (~70% on news-free days) takes over as the dominant driver

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY tests PMH 675.98 within first 60 min of RTH (by 10:30 ET) and fails to close a 5-min bar above it, then trades down to PML 673.98 before 12:00 ET
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY closes any 5-min bar above 675.98 during the first 60 min of RTH (09:30–10:30 ET)

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX remains above 19.50 through 10:30 ET, sustaining the risk-off macro backdrop and confirming no meaningful short-cover rally reversal
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX drops below 18.50 by 09:45 ET, signaling sentiment reversal and collapsing the macro bearish case

swarm_predictions.claim: CLEAN_BEAR ribbon (fast below pivot below slow) holds through the first two RTH bars (09:35 and 09:40 ET) — no full inversion on open
swarm_predictions.invalidation: Fast EMA crosses above pivot EMA on the 09:35 or 09:40 ET bar (requires sustained SPY price above ~676.25)

synthesis_narrative: SPY enters 4/13 with the swarm's first 4/4 unanimous bearish vote: CLEAN_BEAR ribbon at 138c spread, $3.97 overnight gap down to 675.37, VIX rising +3.98% to 20.1, and a completely clean macro calendar — every specialist layer aligned. The pivotal tension is the paper-thin 61c gap between current price and PMH 675.98: SPY is coiled at the premarket ceiling with the validator flagging a moderate-robustness warning (gap fills happen 70%+ on news-free days, XLK is actually green on the session, ribbon is only 1.38 wide). Watch PMH 675.98 behavior on the first RTH bar: rejection confirms the flush to PML 673.98 (and potentially 651.06 below); a clean hold above it immediately flips to the bullish secondary scenario targeting 678.45.

technical.one_line: CLEAN_BEAR ribbon (138c spread, fast 675.62 < pivot 675.88 < slow 677.00), price 51c below pivot, $3.97 gap down, doji indecision on final 2 bars near pivot ceiling

macro.one_line: VIX 20.1 MID regime rising +3.98% (above 1.5% threshold for directional signal), $3.97 overnight gap down, risk_off backdrop, zero macro events (full trading window)

level_thesis.one_line: Battle level PMH 675.98 (61c above price) is the first decision — rejection confirms bear flush to PML 673.98; reclaim flips setup to bullish target 678.45

internals.one_line: Selective risk_off rotation: XLF -0.9% (yield/rate-driven weakness), XLK flat/green (+0.08%) — narrow breadth limits downside conviction but does not override structural bear

validator.top_invalidation: SPY holds above PMH 675.98 on first RTH bar — gap-fill probability (~70% on news-free days) + XLK outperformance + ribbon compression (1.38 wide) all point toward reversion; one good open reverses the entire thesis
